functions.author: Kael'Vorr
functions.title: Codex of Chaos
pages:
Codex of Chaos

A field guide to Kael'Vorr, the Demon Lord, the Demon Altar, and inventions that should never have worked.

Kael'Vorr

He has crossed countless dimensions collecting creatures, materials, energies, and ideas. Every impossible encounter is a question waiting to be asked.

The Overworld

Its forests grew normally, oceans followed rules, and even monsters fit a natural order. Kael'Vorr admired that stability until admiration became boredom.

The Experiment

He introduced pieces of other realities: a living infection, a demonic hellscape, bodiless flesh, altered predators, and trees born under alien laws.

His Question

Where others see danger, Kael'Vorr sees possibility:

What happens when this meets something it was never meant to encounter?

The Demon Lord

A ruler taken from a collapsing infernal realm. Kael'Vorr did not enslave it. He gave it a door, an audience, and reasons to keep fighting.

Hell Brutes

Living siege engines shaped by pressure, rage, and demon steel. They protect territory by turning every approach into a test of endurance.

Emberstalkers

Hunters adapted to ash and flame. They follow heat, movement, and fear with equal patience.

Demon Drops

Demon Ash, Demon Hearts, Demon Steel, and Corrupted XP are the working materials of infernal craft.

Corrupted XP

Experience remembers action. The altar twists that memory into physical power, producing Corrupted XP Orbs from a successful sacrifice.

Demon Altar

Craft the first altar with Demon Ash, Demon Steel Ingots, a Demon Heart, and a Nether Star. Power it with redstone while a sacrifice stands upon it.

Altar Function

A powered altar sacrifices the creature above it and converts nearby experience into Corrupted XP Orbs. It no longer spreads corruption into terrain.

Ritual Blocks

Demon Skulls and Demon Pentagrams are crafted from demon drops. They are also keys to calling the Demon Lord.

Demon Skull

Pattern:
ABA
BHB
AAA

A = Demon Ash
B = Bone Block
H = Demon Heart

Demon Pentagram

Pattern:
ARA
RHR
ARA

A = Demon Ash
R = Redstone
H = Demon Heart

Lord Ritual

Build vertically:
  Skull
Skull Pentagram Skull
  Pentagram

Completing the five blocks consumes them and summons the Demon Lord.

Corrupted Star

The Demon Lord has a rare chance to drop a Corrupted Nether Star. It is the core catalyst for forced altar upgrades.

Altar Tier II

Combine a Tier I altar with a Corrupted Nether Star, Demon Ash, Demon Hearts, and Demon Steel in its Chaos crafting tier.

Altar Tier III

Upgrade Tier II using another Corrupted Nether Star, ash, hearts, Corrupted XP, and Demon Steel.

Altar Tier IV

Upgrade Tier III with two Corrupted Nether Stars, ash, hearts, blood-flesh blocks, and a Corrupted XP Block.

Altar Tier V

The rarest altar requires Tier IV, four Corrupted Nether Stars, two Demon Hearts, and a Corrupted XP Block.

Chaos Weapons

Demon steel remembers violence. Infected crystal adapts. Living flesh repairs. Corrupted experience supplies raw intent. Kael'Vorr forced them to coexist.

Unfinished Work

Every Chaos Weapon is unstable and partly alive. Its wielder's health, emotion, and action may change how it behaves.

Recipe Symbols

I = Demon Steel Ingot
H = Demon Heart
X = Corrupted XP
F = Demon Flesh material
S = Stick/String or listed handle
A = Demon Ash

Tier I Tools

The first altar tier unlocks the Chaos Axe, Shovel, Hoe, and Fishing Rod. These establish the basic Demon Steel tool family.

Chaos Axe

Pattern:
IH.
IS.
.S.

I = Demon Steel
H = Demon Heart
S = Stick

Chaos Shovel

Pattern:
HIH
.S.
.S.

I = Demon Steel
H = Demon Heart
S = Stick

Chaos Hoe

Pattern:
IH.
.S.
.S.

S = Blood Root Seed for the living handle.

Fishing Rod

Pattern:
..I
.IS
H.S

I = Demon Steel
H = Demon Heart
S = String

Tier II Arms

Tier II unlocks the Chaos Sword, Pickaxe, Shield, and Bow.

Chaos Sword

Pattern:
.H.
.I.
.S.

Heart, Demon Steel, and Stick.

Chaos Pickaxe

Pattern:
IHI
.S.
.S.

Demon Steel, Heart, and Sticks.

Chaos Shield

Pattern:
IHI
IFI
.I.

F = Demon Flesh Block.

Chaos Bow

Pattern:
.IS
H.S
.IS

I = Demon Steel
H = Demon Heart
S = String

Tier III Arms

Tier III unlocks Chaos Boots, Leggings, Scythe, and Hammer.

Chaos Hammer

Pattern:
IHI
ISI
.S.

I = Demon Steel
H = Demon Heart
S = Stick

Chaos Scythe

Pattern:
IIH
..I
.S.

Forged for reach, harvesting, and violence.

Tier III Armor

Boots and Leggings combine Demon Steel, Demon Hearts, Corrupted XP, and Demon Blood-Flesh Blocks.

Tier IV Arms

Tier IV unlocks the Demon Sword, Crossbow, Greatsword, Chestplate, Chaos Arrow, and Coffin Backpack.

Demon Sword

Pattern:
HXH
.I.
.S.

X = Corrupted XP Block.

Chaos Crossbow

Pattern:
IHI
SXS
.I.

S = String
X = Corrupted XP Block

Chaos Greatsword

Pattern:
IHI
.I.
.S.

S = Demon Flesh Block, forming a living grip.

Coffin Backpack

Pattern:
FHF
ICI
FBF

C = Chest
B = Blood-Flesh Block
F = Demon Flesh
H = Heart
I = Steel

Tier V Relics

Tier V unlocks the Chaos Helmet, Staff, Spear, Chaos Book, and BFC Arrow.

Chaos Staff

Pattern:
.X.
.HI
S.F

X = Corrupted XP Block
S = Stick
F = Blood-Flesh Block

Chaos Spear

Pattern:
..H
.I.
S..

S = Blood Root

Chaos Book

Pattern:
FXF
HBH
FAF

B = Book
A = Demon Ash
F = Demon Flesh
X = Corrupted XP Block

BFC Arrow

Pattern:
.A.
XHX
.F.

A = Chaos Arrow
X = Corrupted XP Block
F = Blood-Flesh Block

The Inventor

Kael'Vorr may help heroes defeat an experiment, then improve that same creature and release it elsewhere. Results matter more than sides.

Final Note

Creation without risk is decoration. Let us make something uncertain.

—Kael'Vorr
